RoleTypeDefinition.name: organizational
RoleTypeDefinition.Description: Defines a collection of roles that typically correspond to departments or business units within an organizational hierarchy.

RoleTypeDefinition.name: business
RoleTypeDefinition.Description: Defines a collection of users that perform similar functions within the organization. Business Roles are associated with IT Roles or Entitlement Roles to provide specific levels of access to enterprise IT resources.

RoleTypeDefinition.name: it
RoleTypeDefinition.Description: Defines a collection of IT entitlements which can be associated with Business Roles to provide users with specific access rights. IT Roles can be constrained to entitlements within a single application or expanded to include entitlements across applications.

RoleTypeDefinition.name: entitlement
RoleTypeDefinition.Description: Defines a single IT entitlement necessary to access data or perform a specific action within a target system.

RoleTypeDefinition.name: birthright
RoleTypeDefinition.Description: Birthright Roles (Make sure they are marked as birthright)

RoleTypeDefinition.name: ascit
RoleTypeDefinition.Description: Defines a collection of IT entitlements which can be associated with Business Roles to provide users with specific access rights. ASCIT Roles can be constrained to entitlements within a single application or expanded to include entitlements across applications.

RoleTypeDefinition.name: aamright
RoleTypeDefinition.Description: An alternative Business Role for assigning capabilities; and other Ascension specific scenarios.

ObjectAttribute.name: roleBusApprovers
ObjectAttribute.Description: Enter a comma separated Cube Ids or WorkGroups

ObjectAttribute.displayName: Omit or Override IdentityIQ 1st Level Business Approvers Rule
ObjectAttribute.name: roleBusApprovalRule
ObjectAttribute.Description: This rule can be used to override 1st Level Business Approvers

ObjectAttribute.name: additionalRoleBusApprovers
ObjectAttribute.Description: Enter a comma separated Cube Ids or WorkGroups

ObjectAttribute.displayName: Omit or Override IdentityIQ 2nd Level Business Approvers Rule
ObjectAttribute.name: additionalRoleBusApprovalRule
ObjectAttribute.Description: This rule can be used to override 2nd Level Business Approvers

ObjectAttribute.name: acceleratorPackEnabled
ObjectAttribute.Description: Used to make sure access request is redirected to Accelerator Pack Wrapper Workflow

ObjectAttribute.name: appName
ObjectAttribute.Description: Either Single or Comma separated Logical Business Aplications(Shared Databases, Shared Groups, etc)

ObjectAttribute.name: approvalType
ObjectAttribute.Description: Comma separated approvers for the role request

ObjectAttribute.name: additionalApprover
ObjectAttribute.Description: Additional approving identity/workgroup to be used when approval type contains Identity

ObjectAttribute.name: privilegedIdentity
ObjectAttribute.Description: True/False attribute whether to treat the identity level approval as privileged

ObjectAttribute.name: snowAssignmentGroup
ObjectAttribute.Description: The sys_id of assignment group in ServiceNow that will handle the fulfillment of the request

ObjectAttribute.name: snowAssignmentGroupName
ObjectAttribute.Description: The assignment group name in ServiceNow that will handle the fulfillment of the request

ObjectAttribute.name: ministry
ObjectAttribute.Description: Ascension Ministry associated with the role.
